title: quercus kiukiangensis
intro: Quercus kiukiangensis, also known as the Chinese red oak or Chinese evergreen oak, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Fagaceae. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Quercus kiukiangensis include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Quercus kiukiangensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
